full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #49 (2026-06-01)

PULSE
Health: 0.5758 (C). 1033 wallets, 292 contributors. 52 memos today vs 96 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
60 reward payments, 363150 PFT distributed to 22 contributors. Top earner: rU963x...fyUj (123000 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 3,500 PFT. Highest: r4ahFv...5XyU (3,500 PFT). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (24,300 PFT, avg 4,050/day over 6 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rs5gTo...VF97 (64 memos). Fastest new contributor: rU963x...fyUj (33.0 memos/day in 1 days). 24 new wallet(s) this week. 55 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 71.0%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-05-02): 145 transactions from 22 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
